'''Ossus Day''' was a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] in remembrance of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who [[Death/Legends|died]] in combat. It originated in [[Knossa/Legends|Knossa]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], where two obelisks topped with [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] stood in the central plaza. The day Ossus' [[Moon/Legends|moons]] aligned with them, a display of light ensued. The Jedi held the day to be sacred.<ref name="GatORW" />

In common usage in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], "Ossus Day" meant any such time of reflection. The [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Ossus Day (starship)|''Ossus Day'']] was named after this term.<ref name="GatORW" />
